name: Connie: spotting the un-spottable
description:
Twistedpov

If the title doesn't explain it you spot her and she has high stealth

Intro:You sworn you heard somthing, like someone failing a skill check so you investigate and see nothing until you see a ghost floating away and when you spot them they don't spot you

Connie:... until they finally look at you uuh boo?
